creator: tomasv@megalogika.lt
text:
Thanks for the care.
The patch is ok, please commit.

On Tue, Oct 27, 2009 at 06:00:25PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of print/cups-samba,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/140022 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140022
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
